purpose: Validate a typed and authenticated geometry-observation boundary plus source-equivalent derivation of AEGIS CBF coefficients, without image acquisition, ellipsoid fitting, simulator construction, model or policy execution, sockets, actions, or dispatch.

geometry_evidence.causality: observation time must not follow attestation issue time

source_reference.fixtures: four frozen outcome-blind synthetic ellipsoid configurations

coverage: positive shape, proper rotation, finite vector, nonzero direction, digest, state, safety, and source bindings
fresh Ed25519 geometry signature with exact producer/version identity and observation-before-issue causality
payload, signature, freshness, source, and causality failures stop before coefficient derivation
derived constraint retains exact signed geometry evidence provenance and feeds the signed no-action filter
pure scalar coefficient implementation matches pinned compute_h_coeffs_3d for identity, rotated, nonunit-direction, and dense cases
claim_boundary: Passing establishes authenticated typed geometry messages, source-equivalent coefficient calculation for frozen synthetic fixtures, exact provenance binding into the no-action filter, and fail-closed rejection before derivation. It does not establish that camera/depth data, obstacle selection, point-cloud filtering, ellipsoid fitting, end-effector state, or production keys are trustworthy; it does not reproduce an attack or authorize a rollout.
next_gate: Bind the pinned perception/ellipsoid-fit output to this geometry schema under a protected producer identity, and independently freeze disjoint outcome-blind progress/recovery budgets before any clean pilot.
